steps.title: Identify what glaciers and icebergs both do
steps.content: Notes 3 and 6 establish that glaciers contribute to rising sea levels (in summer) and icebergs contribute to rising sea levels (year-round). This shared outcome is the similarity the student should emphasize.

steps.title: Find the choice that expresses this similarity
steps.content: B is the only choice that names both objects and states their shared effect: “both melt...contributing to rising sea levels.” The others don't show what glaciers and icebergs have in common. That matches choice B—B is correct.
